properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our Father in Heaven Hallowed be Your name Your Kingdom come quickly Your will be done the same

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On earth as it is in Heaven Let Heaven come to earth As it is in Heaven Let Heaven come

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Let Heaven come Let Heaven come Let Heaven come Let Heaven come :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Yours is the Kingdom, Yours is the power Yours is the glory forever, amen :/
